sisyphus.description: Main ultraworker agent. Primary coding agent tuned for GPT-family models. Handles complex implementation tasks with deep reasoning.

hephaestus.description: Deep autonomous worker. 'Codex on steroids.' GPT-native agent for complex autonomous coding tasks. Requires GPT access with no non-GPT fallback.

oracle.description: Architecture and debugging agent. High-IQ strategic backup with GPT-prompting. Excels at reasoning about complex systems and debugging issues.

librarian.description: Documentation and code search agent. Optimized for speed over intelligence. Handles doc retrieval, code searching, and RAG tasks.

explore.description: Fast codebase exploration agent. Optimized for speed — grep, search, and navigate code. Do not upgrade to an expensive model.

multimodal-looker.description: Vision and screenshot analysis agent. Handles image inputs, UI screenshots, and visual debugging tasks.

prometheus.description: Strategic planner. Creates detailed work plans through an interview process. GPT-native prompt workflow.

metis.description: Plan review agent. Reviews Prometheus plans for gaps, edge cases, and completeness. Second-pair-of-eyes for planning.

momus.description: High-accuracy verification agent. GPT-native reviewer for validating outputs. Uses xhigh variant for maximum precision.

atlas.description: Todo orchestrator. Manages and tracks task lists across sessions. GPT-native prompt workflow.

sisyphus-junior.description: Lighter variant of Sisyphus. Uses GPT for faster, cheaper execution on simpler tasks.
